title: Frontend Engineer for Editorial Planeta
description: Implementation of refined digital experiences and migration of legacy components to modern modular JavaScript structures for casadellibro.com.
body:
For **Editorial Planeta**, I worked on the development of the **casadellibro.com** portal, one of the most important online book sales platforms in the Spanish language.

## Modernization of the platform

One of the main axes of the project was the **migration of legacy components** towards modular and maintainable **JavaScript** structures. Old code, difficult to scale, was transformed into clean, testable modules integrated with the modern ecosystem.

## Refined digital experiences

Beyond the migration, it was about implementing careful user experiences: animations, transitions, interactions and purchase flows that had to be fluid and accessible on all devices.

## Technology stack

The project combined **VueJS** for reactive components, **PHP** and **Symfony** on the backend, and a presentation layer built with **HTML5** and **SCSS**, consuming **REST APIs** for product, search, and user account management.

## Technologies

- HTML5
- SCSS
- JavaScript
- REST APIs
- VueJS
- PHP
- Symfony

Project: [casadellibro.com](https://www.casadellibro.com/)
